title: 🔥宏观风控信号明确
body: 市场处于宏观流动性压制阶段。BMRI 报 74（RISK_OFF），显示当前资金风险偏好低迷，杠杆意愿显著不足。虽读数略高于 5 月均值 66.76，但距离 95 以上的风险开启阈值仍有较大空间。油价波动干扰降息押注，宏观紧缩预期导致流动性无法有效传导。中性。宏观流动性何时逆转？
body_en: The market is in a phase of macro liquidity suppression. The BMRI prints 74 (RISK_OFF), signaling depressed risk appetite and a notable lack of willingness to leverage. While the reading is slightly above the May average of 66.76, there’s still a significant gap to the 95+ risk-on trigger. Oil volatility is skewing rate cut bets, and macro tightening expectations are blocking effective liquidity transmission. Neutral. When will macro liquidity reverse?
